tracemalloc/DomainFilter/inclusive.name: inclusive
tracemalloc/DomainFilter/inclusive.description: If inclusive is True (include), match memory blocks allocated in the address space domain. If inclusive is False (exclude), match memory blocks not allocated in the address space domain.

info.excerpt: If inclusive is True (include), match memory blocks allocated in the address space domain. If inclusive is False (exclude), match memory blocks not allocated in the address space domain.

tracemalloc/Filter/inclusive.name: inclusive
tracemalloc/Filter/inclusive.description: If inclusive is True (include), only match memory blocks allocated in a file with a name matching filename_pattern at line number lineno. If inclusive is False (exclude), ignore memory blocks allocated in a file with a name matching filename_pattern at line number lineno.

info.excerpt: If inclusive is True (include), only match memory blocks allocated in a file with a name matching filename_pattern at line number lineno. If inclusive is False (exclude), ignore memory blocks allocate...

tracemalloc/is_tracing.name: is_tracing
tracemalloc/is_tracing.description: True if the tracemalloc module is tracing Python memory allocations, False otherwise. See also start() and stop() functions.

info.excerpt: True if the tracemalloc module is tracing Python memory allocations, False otherwise. See also start() and stop() functions.
